{{CargoRelic
|name=Electric Fishing Net
|class_id=20306
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=When the tadpole pond underproduced due to overfishing, a new solution came along... This net is hooked up to high-voltage electricity and sprawled over the pond to electrocute the tadpoles! The pinnacle of efficiency and convenience!
|fame=16
|art=12
|fth=19
|civ=13
|tech=30
|ss1=Tadpole Pond Max Cap +2%
|ss2=Tadpole Pond Max Cap +4%
|ss3=Tadpole Pond Max Cap +6%
|ss4=Tadpole Pond Max Cap +6%
|ss7=Tadpole Pond Max Cap +6%<br> (Awakened)
}}
